frontmatter.title: IPL Auction
frontmatter.description: A companion app I built to run an IPL-style player auction game at our college tech fest, so the whole auction stayed smooth and easy to manage.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Claim a team, outbid the room, and build the best squad
